defaultLocale.name: Tabliss
defaultLocale.description: A beautiful New Tab page with many customisable backgrounds and widgets that does not require any permissions.

defaultLocale.name: Firefox Color
defaultLocale.description: Theming experiment for Firefox Quantum and beyond.
defaultLocale.creator: Les Orchard <me@lmorchard.com>

defaultLocale.name: Forget Me Not - Forget cookies & other data
defaultLocale.description: Make the browser forget website data, except for the data you want to keep.
defaultLocale.creator: Santo Pfingsten

locales.name: Forget Me Not - Forget cookies & other data
locales.description: Make the browser forget website data, except for the data you want to keep.
locales.creator: Santo Pfingsten

locales.name: Njezabywaj mě - cookieje a druge daty zabyś
locales.description: Dajśo wobglědowakoju daty websedłow zabyś, mimo datow, kótarež cośo wobchowaś.
locales.creator: Santo Pfingsten

locales.name: Forget Me Not - Esquecer cookies e outros dados
locales.description: Faça o seu navegador esquecer dados de websites, exceto os dados que pretende manter.
locales.creator: Santo Pfingsten

locales.name: Forget me not - Nettoyez les cookies et autres données de navigation
locales.description: Nettoyez les données du navigateur de recherches, conservez celles qui vous intéressent
locales.creator: Santo Pfingsten

locales.name: Forget Me Not - Hapus kuki & data lainnya
locales.description: Membuat peramban menghapus data situs, kecuali data yang ingin anda simpan.
locales.creator: Santo Pfingsten

locales.name: Glöm Mig Inte - Glöm kakor & annan data
locales.description: Gör så att din webläsare glömmer web data, förutom den data du vill behålla.
locales.creator: Santo Pfingsten

locales.name: Forget Me Not - Olvida cookies y otros datos
locales.description: Hacé que el navegador olvide la información de las páginas web, excepto por la que querés mantener.
locales.creator: Santo Pfingsten

locales.name: Forget Me Not - Oblida les galetes i altres dades
locales.description: Fes que el navegador oblidi les dades de la web, exceptuant les dades que vulguis guardar.
locales.creator: Santo Pfingsten

locales.name: من را فراموش نکن - کوکی ها و بقیه داده ها را فراموش کن
locales.description: مرورگر وب خودتون را مجبور کنید که داده های وب سایت را از یاد ببره, مگر داده هایی که خودتون میخواین نگه دارین.
locales.creator: Santo Pfingsten

locales.name: Vergiss Mein Nicht - Vergiss Cookies und andere Daten
locales.description: Lass den Browser Website-Daten vergessen, abgesehen derer, die du behalten möchtest.
locales.creator: Santo Pfingsten

locales.name: Nie Zapomnij Mnie - Usuń ciasteczka i inne dane
locales.description: Usuń zachowane dane z witryn, z wyjątkiem tych które chcesz zachować.
locales.creator: Santo Pfingsten

locales.name: Njezabywaj mje - Placki a druhe daty zabyć
locales.description: Dajće wobhladowakej daty websydłow zabyć, nimo datow, kotrež chceće wobchować.
locales.creator: Santo Pfingsten

locales.name: Forget Me Not - Unohda evästeet ja muut tiedot
locales.description: Aseta selain unohtamaan sivustojen tiedot, poislukien haluamasi säästettävät.
locales.creator: Santo Pfingsten

locales.name: Forget Me Not - Cookileri ve diğer verileri unut
locales.description: Web tarayıcınızı website verilerini unutmasını sağlar, tutmak istedikleriniz hariç.
locales.creator: Santo Pfingsten

locales.name: Forget Me Not - Apagar cookies & mais
locales.description: Faça o navegador apagar dados de sites, exceto o que quiser manter.
locales.creator: Santo Pfingsten

locales.name: Forget Me Not - очистка куки и других данных
locales.description: Заставьте браузер очищать данные всех сайтов, кроме тех, которые вы хотите сохранить.
locales.creator: Santo Pfingsten

locales.name: Forget Me Not - Dimentica cookie e dati
locales.description: Fai in modo che il browser dimentichi i dati dei siti, eccetto quelli che vuoi conservare.
locales.creator: Santo Pfingsten

defaultLocale.name: Browsec VPN - Free VPN Extension
defaultLocale.description: Browsec VPN is a Firefox VPN extension that protects your IP from Internet threats and lets you browse privately for free.

locales.name: Browsec VPN - Free VPN Extension
locales.description: Browsec VPN is a Firefox VPN extension that protects your IP from Internet threats and lets you browse privately for free.

locales.name: Browsec VPN - Bezplatné rozšíření VPN
locales.description: Discover the best free VPN downloads available today.

locales.name: Browsec VPN — безкоштовний VPN
locales.description: Browsec VPN — це VPN-розширення для Firefox для безпечного доступу до YouTube, Facebook та інших сервісів і сайтів.

locales.name: Browsec Freedom VPN
locales.description: Experience the ultimate in VPN super unlimited proxy capabilities with our top-tier service for seamless and secure browsing.

locales.name: Browsec VPN - ส่วนขยาย VPN ฟรี
locales.description: Browsec VPN เป็นส่วนขยาย VPN สำหรับ Firefox ที่ช่วยปกป้อง IP ของคุณจากภัยคุกคามทางอินเทอร์เน็ต และให้คุณท่องเว็บแบบส่วนตัวได้ฟรี

locales.name: Browsec VPN - Free VPN
locales.description: Browsec VPN helps you stay private online and protects your IP from internet threats, both in the UK and around the world. Your privacy matters now more than ever!

locales.name: Browsec VPN - бесплатное ВПН расширение
locales.description: Бесплатный VPN для Firefox без регистрации. Обходите блокировки, смотрите YouTube и защищайте свой IP одним нажатием

locales.name: Browsec VPN - Extensie VPN gratuită
locales.description: VPN gratuit pentru a debloca Youtube, Facebook, Instagram și alte servicii populare cu un singur clic. Obțineți cel mai bun VPN gratuit

locales.name: Browsec VPN - Δωρεάν επέκταση VPN
locales.description: Discover the power of VPN free online for secure browsing and privacy protection with our reliable service

locales.name: Browsec VPN - Gratis VPN-udvidelse
locales.description: Browsec VPN er en Firefox VPN-udvidelse, der beskytter din IP mod internettrusler og lader dig surfe privat helt gratis

defaultLocale.name: Proton VPN: Fast & Secure
defaultLocale.description: Secure your internet and protect your online privacy in one click.

defaultLocale.name: Privacy Badger
defaultLocale.description: Automatically learns to block hidden trackers. Made by leading digital rights nonprofit EFF to stop companies from spying on you.
defaultLocale.creator: privacybadger-owner@eff.org

locales.name: Privacy Badger
locales.description: Automatically learns to block hidden trackers. Made by leading digital rights nonprofit EFF to stop companies from spying on you.

locales.name: Privacy Badger
locales.description: 隠れたトラッカーを自動的に学習してブロックします。EFF（電子フロンティア財団）が提供する、企業の監視からあなたを守るためのツールです。
locales.creator: privacybadger-owner@eff.org

locales.name: Privacy Badger
locales.description: Bloque les traceurs cachés. Crée par la FFÉ, OSBL de défense des droits numériques, pour empêcher les entreprises de vous espionner.
locales.creator: privacybadger-owner@eff.org

locales.name: Privacy Badger
locales.description: Lär sig att blockera dolda spårare. Skapad av den ideella organisationen EFF för att hindra företag från att spionera på dig.
locales.creator: privacybadger-owner@eff.org

locales.creator: privacybadger-owner@eff.org

locales.description: Automatically learns to block hidden trackers. Made by leading digital rights nonprofit EFF to stop companies from spying on you.

locales.name: Dark Reader

locales.name: Dark Reader

locales.name: Dark Reader
